summary: Frontend testing completed for sticky sidebar feature. All 5 features verified: Left Library+Pages panel sticky, Right Properties panel sticky, No blank columns during scroll, Sidebar inner content scrollable, No auth->dashboard->builder regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning persists: 'Each child in a list should have unique key prop' in SectionRenderer - recommend adding unique key prop
Sticky implementation uses xl:sticky xl:top-5 xl:self-start wrappers in BuilderPage.jsx lines 879 and 913 - working correctly
builder-shell-workspace class with overflow:visible in App.css enables sticky positioning to work properly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested at 1920x800 viewport as requested. Sticky sidebar feature working correctly - both sidebars remain at top:16-20px after scrolling 500px, 1000px, 2000px, 3000px. Inner scroll areas functional. Sections/Pages tabs switch properly. Auth->Dashboard->Builder flow works.

details: Left Library+Pages panel remains at top:20px after scrolling
Panel has full content (not blank) at all scroll positions
Right Properties panel remains at top:20px after scrolling
Panel has full content (not blank) at all scroll positions
Both sidebars maintain visible content while scrolling long canvas
sidebarHasContent: true, panelHasContent: true verified at 2000px scroll
Content includes all expected elements: stats, tabs, search, library cards, page list
Left sidebar Sections tab scrollable - scroll area works
Pages tab shows page list with scrollable content
Tab switching (Sections/Pages) functional while sidebars sticky
Open builder button navigates to builder page
Builder loads with all three columns (sidebar, canvas, panel)
